submission.raw_text: My name is Jordan Lee, and this is a synthetic test case. On about March 12, 2026, I agreed with Priya Nair to restore six dining chairs for $1,800, with $900 paid upfront and $900 due after delivery. Priya messaged, “They look ready for the hotel lobby,” but said one cushion still needed stitching. Around April 2, 2026, Priya collected four chairs while I kept two to finish. Priya later alleged that I scratched all six chairs, but I only observed a mark on one chair and I have not inspected her photographs. I am asking Priya to pay the remaining $900 after I deliver the last two chairs; I am not asking to refund her.
